reviews.review_description: If you're used to playing games where you have classes with traditional roles, such as tank, damage dealers, and healers, you'll learn fast and really have fun. If you have never done that before it's going to take longer to understand how to make your characters work together to defeat the bosses (hint: always take a tank with you - you get a repair armor on every turn). I've never had any technical issues with the game and the graphics and gameplay are really great. I highly recommend!

At first I rated this game five stars because of how enjoyable it was, but it is no longer enjoyable because the developers keep screwing with the game. The game has way too many issues including connection to the internet, server issues, audio issues and lagging. The die needs to be readjusted so there's less misses (skulls or crossed bones on the slime die) because for the past several months I've received about 75% miss rolls and still receiving them. There's nothing enjoyable when you constantly miss to the point of getting killed over and over. Please add more content or change the narration at the end of Rein of Maddness because it says "That's the end of this story, would you like another"? Please fix issues that have been there since day one, add more stories to match the levels we earned and stop placing all of your attention into Dungeons and Dragons Battle Marked because you don't understand what players want.

reviews.review_title: Don’t listen to the bad reviews
reviews.review_description:
The people that rate this game low are just crybabies that like easy games, this is literally one of the best games on meta quest and the Demeo devs did a great job making this game! 
If you like a challenge and a strong community as well as a very fun challenging experience then this game is for you! 
Don’t worry about not being the best in the beginning, we all gotta start somewhere!
GO HAVE SOME FUN!

An update to my review from last year. There is still no option to clear a dungeon. Just endlessly spawning enemies….

My biggest issue with this game is that the enemies continue to spawn endlessly!!

Enemies spawn from “nests,” they spawn from floating orbs, they spawn from other enemies. It’s just ridiculous and doesn’t feel like you’re accomplishing anything.

It’s such a missed opportunity that they didn’t consider a game mode where you get to level up the characters.

Its extremely frustrating. Save your money. Enemies spawn continuously so There’s no way to clear the board and accomplish anything. You don’t get enough health cards given or that u can purchase. It’s honestly ridiculous. I wish I could get my money back.

When I first saw it, I thought it was gonna be really boring to be in a tabletop game but after I played it, I realize it’s really good, but it would be better if you could add difficulties and more books with more classes, but even without that is a really really good game. Do not listen. Listen to any of the bad reviews.
The first campaign is good. The next ones seem to be unenjoyable slogs with twice as many mobs as they should have.

I really like this game. The only thing holding this back from a true 5 star rating is it starts to feel repetitive pretty quick. BTW, this complaint is totally resolved by the D&D version of Demeo, which I have at 5 stars.

This is an overall well made game and I like the idea of it but the campaigns are stupidly difficult, primarily because the enemy has better powers and more numbers. Strategy goes out the window when some random can just fly across the map and spawn a whole new batch of enemies in one go while you're still stuck in a limited radius and having to use multiple turns to reach and hit lower level enemies while taking multiple hits.

If it were ever to be altered to make for better balancing it could be fun to play but it doesn't look very likely so ultimately it's just a waste.

Could be a fun game, however it seems very buggy or like each level is on a timer.  There’s 1 miss on the dice, 1 double, and the rest singles.  The miss comes up sometimes more than the singles and that is statistically impossible.

I love DEMEO! I tried the battle and the one with dungeon and dragon both are not as fun! I have been playing since it came out unfortunately they no longer make any new story board! I’m sick of playing the same ones!

I've had it for years and it's still unplayable. If I'm lucky I'll get around 20 minutes before I'm swarmed by enemies and then it's Game Over.

Lucky Demeo x Dungeons & Dragons is out now and it's everything I'd hoped Demeo would be. It's playable by "non professionals", has an interesting story, and the D&D elements add some surprises and variety to the mix.

If you're a hardcore player who doesn't mind devoting many hours a day to gaming then this might be a challenge you'll enjoy. If you're a casual gamer and it's too difficult for you be sure to request a refund before the two hour window closes because it's unlikely it'll get any easier. Then put your refund towards Demeo x Dungeons & Dragons. ;)

I love this game it's the closest I get to the ttrpg d&d



 games that I play in the real world All credit to the designers & developers truly awesome

I love the idea of this game! Great graphics and premise! Cool atmosphere! Interesting characters! Nice implementation of hand-tracking (despite not being able to figure how to end a turn early with that and some occasional sticking issues)! Decent mechanics!
But wow it is rock hard! From the jump, there are so many enemies! And as soon as you alert one group, every single enemy on that floor come running up to you! I thought you would deal with them as you enter a room, but there are so many and they come for you, not giving you a moment to breathe and recharge your spells even. And they can dish out serious damage too! This can be quite game-breaking because it is just too much to deal with! If you fix this and scale back the enemies, then this will be an incredible game!
You need to pace it better and introduce a few at a time and increase maybe as you progress and get more powers. But as it is, you guys are like the most sadistic dungeon master ever. 
I give it 4 stars for its potential. Hurry and fix this difficulty problem and I might push it to 5 stars...

I really wanted to like this as I played Hero Quest as a kid and that was fun to play. This isn’t that. It’s excruciating and not fun. I only play single player and haven’t been able to win a game yet so can’t progress at all. The constant randomness and endless spawning enemies makes it impossible. I also thought there would have been more story to it as you played and the journey progressed through the rooms, but there’s none. If you could turn off the endless spawning enemies and gave a difficulty selector then that would be a start. It looks good and the gameplay is interesting, but is impossible to play so feel like I’m wasting my time with it.
Great game to just kick back and enjoy. Need more board games like this

Why  is there no progression in this game? No way to make your character stronger. The only things you can get are cosmetic upgrades. This is one of the worst games to play. I dont know why people are giving it 5 stars.  I try to play and I get immediately jumped by 10-15 monsters. My party is wiped out on the first or second floor of the dungeon.  Whoooo hoooo that’s so much fun. 5 stars!! I can’t save anywhere except one lousy spot yeah so much fun.  5 Stars.  I can’t better my character in ANY way yes I love it. 5 stars. What a joke. One Skull on a 12 sided Die and it come up 4 out of 5 rolls. That seems fair. Game should have an overall rating of 3 at the most.
A 12 sided dice that has one negative face, but only hits that one side?  The odds NEED to be fixed ASAP. Tell me im wrong and this somehow makes sense.

I love this game, however I spent alot of time when I first purchased this for my son and I who is much more gamer than I am now. He thought the game without building characters XP, instead we get some type of level climbing with cosmetics?  Him and I played for a few days and found this even for him was hard. I continued on however I found I just kept getting rushed through the levels to avoid respawns.  

Please if you cannot build the characters like battle mark, can you guys just tone down option for difficultly? And would be nice if there was more books.  

I am not an expert player, I play games on a casual basis. However this game just leaves me tired and frustrated.

reviews.review_title: Bug report after the last update
reviews.review_description: After the last update the warlock card "astral strike" is bugged: the animation does not start resulting in no enemy damage and a lost turn. There's also a graphical glitch: sometimes after the warlock takes damage she becomes transaparent (you can see only the glowing ball and the ring weapon). Please fix them (the first one in particular since it affects the effectiveness of the character).

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
Thanks for reporting. The Astral Strike bug has been fixed in the latest patch (January 12:th).

reviews.review_title: So close to being a great game
reviews.review_description: There's so many things this game does right. Unfortunately the devs completely missed the mark because of one thing, endless and constant spawns. It could be a great game but endless spawns turn it into an annoying slog real fast.

I played for hours and was on the last stage. This game requires meticulous  planning and I really had my game going until a bug ruined my run completely. 

Also, it’s not a great game.
It has lovely graphics, and demands skill and patience. I love that part of the game. 

What I don’t like:
1. Can’t adjust difficulty level
2. It’s an extremely punishing game, like old school games from the 80’s and early to mid 90’s. Like fun few levels but nobody completes the game, cause it’s merciless. 
3. I breeze through the two levels and it makes me feel capable, but the third level/boss is nothing short of impossible. 
4. For four years now I’ve owned this game and there is hardly anyone online to play with. Kids are cool and all and I see one or two every often but I’d rather play with adults.  

I wasted hours trying to perfect my run on Serpent King. I did like 5 runs easy.

It’s a cool game in theory.

Demeo and Battlemarked are bith amazing games and you will have hours and hours of fun! 

Wish there was more content with both

I came into Demeo excited for a VR dungeon crawler, and the initial quest delivered—it was a fun, engaging, and well-balanced introduction. However, the game instantly falls off a cliff after you complete that first chapter. The difficulty spike in every subsequent quest is utterly broken and feels like an insult to the player's time.

The later dungeons are not challenging; they are unbeatable without extreme luck, requiring an absurd and tedious grind that the game does not support. The health and damage scaling of the enemies makes it feel like the developers never play-tested past the tutorial stage. What starts as a tactical adventure quickly becomes a repetitive, frustrating death loop.

This isn't challenging, strategic gameplay; it's a poorly designed, punitive slog where all the fun is sucked out by mandatory, soul-crushing wipes. Unless you enjoy spending hours making zero progress, do not buy this game. The first quest is a brilliant demo, and everything after it is an utter waste of time.

I feel like I can't uninstall the game or I'll lose my progress. Please fix this.

Edit: Thanks for the clarification. However, when I go to uninstall the game, it warns me that it doesn't have cloud saving and I may lose progress. I'm glad to hear that I won't lose everything, but that warning is alarming to the average player.

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
progress is saved on our servers and connected to your user id. So you can safely reinstall the game and you will keep your progress. Ongoing games are not cloud saved though.

reviews.review_title: Love this game and Battles, but...
reviews.review_description:
Love this game and Battles, but...the newest game that came out, which I’ve been waiting for a long time is priced at full price of $29.95. The same price if you were to buy the bundle (all 3 games).
I strongly believe that the developers should offer their loyal and existing customers who already have both other games, a steep discount. Something along the lines of $9.95.
I believe that by not doing this they will upset many other their loyal clients.
Great game.   Played like 40 hours.   Some bosses might hard in the first run.   I only play single player.   It's a bit hard but manageable.

so i bought this app every started my headset and i've reinstalled it 50 times it's only work twice and every time i try to boot it up it crashes i've purchased this game less than 24 hours ago and the refund was then i do to being played for 2 hours after i got it to work for the one time i am not happy with their product and i will be charging back on my credit card as i have paid for a app that is not responding

reviews.review_title: The best game on the quest until….
reviews.review_description:
They fixed it to think…all good! 

Been playing since day one and my old review shows how great this game is but after this last update every time I play my eyes hurt really bad. Only this game though, all others this doesn’t happen. 

Devs it’s a good game but whatever is causing eye strain with the new graphical improvements please fix. The game is unplayable if it’s going to cause physical pain. 



Old review 

Let me slowly massage the grey matter in your head to get the right consistency so you can decide if spending 30 dollars of diaper money for a 3 level game and if upsetting mamma is worth it! 

As some reviews have already said, it’s more about the experience. Imagine sitting around the game table playing dnd with smelly nerds obnoxiously snorting...well minus the smell!  

Game play? Is it challenging? Imagine being in a red light dungeon and your giggling having a good time until you see a big hairy burley man wearing a pig mask and you cannot remember the safe word. Yeah your stuck like chuck, buddy!  Hope you made some friends online! 

Is the game worth it? my wife thinks so. She thanks the developers for making this game and plans to recommend it it to all her friends so their husbands will leave them alone at night. 

If your into table top games you know what this is and what to expect. If you do not know what table top games are, just get it! It’s as addictive as a chiwawa on acid!  

So keep get the pizza nearby and have fun just remember for the love of god take a shower. Not that anyone can smell you but if you want to keep what life you have left take a $)$&@$ shower.


To the developers, no recommendations , no criticism, your on to something, keep going....good job...very good job!
So many great things about demeo and replay value is amazing.  Mods are allowed to get even more out of the game.

Three times now, after playing for an hour or so, it has crashed.  The log message is "not enough RAM to run Demeo". It looks like they've introduced a memory leak bug.    Restarting the headset doesn't keep it from happening.

reviews.review_title: People complaining about how hard it is
reviews.review_description: It’s honestly not hard most likely u and ur not good at the game and I beat all the books beside the last one and that one is the hardest but the good thing is that their is a lot of champions to use and try but yea game is awesome and ima play the D&D one
Its my favorite game. I don't get how people think its hard.

All of the sudden my profile became unable to join or even create rooms. I no longer can play it with my friends. It smells fishy... I already uninstalled and reinstalled the game and all my friends can still play it without a problem...

reviews.review_title: Great game before it started crashing
reviews.review_description:
When I first got this game I really loved it, it has a good tactical feel of a good strategy game with various characters to mess around with

The tabletop aesthetic is great, and you can adjust the size and scale of everything easily 


HOWEVER, it now crashes almost constantly, I can't even go one turn without a crash, it didn't used to be like this so idk what happened, until they fix this I CANNOT RECOMMEND THIS GAME.

if and when they fix the crashing problem I will update my review, until then steer clear folks, your money is better spent elsewhere.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback. To help us investigate the crashes, could you let us know if there’s anything specific you’re doing when the game crashes?

For example:
• what map/characters you’re using
• what action you take right before the crash
• whether it happens every time you repeat the same steps

Any details that help us reproduce the issue are very valuable. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Great game with friends but I have not been able to join anyone in games recently? Im not sure whats up with the servers it just goes into a loading screen then never loads?

developer_response.body: Hello, this does not sound like a problem with the servers. Please reach out to support@resolutiongames.com and we'll try to help troubleshoot.

reviews.review_description:
So great.   Not hard at all.  Hours of enjoy
ment.    First big win for vr!

reviews.review_title: This is what I was waiting for.
reviews.review_description:
UPDATE 5:
Finally they added save function and it seems to me there is a better balance in the game, I did just one run, but it seems to me there are no more spawn and spawn of enemies and their sight is more realistic. Now it’s what I want from a game like this. Thank you developers!

UPDATE 4:
Not yet save option in skirmish mode… i can’t play a 2 hours session so I can’t play the game I bought, I can only if I accept to completa just one flor and that’s it, usually I must stop there… It’s unfair and absolutely incredible this feature is still missing. No excuse, we want this. And if there will be also the occasion to balance the game better and avoid infinite respawn of enemies… seriously if it was a physical tabletop game it would be a pure and mediocre “American”, not one of the best. It’s a pity a great idea and an awesome game is not growing as it should. 

UPDATE 3:
I thanks developer for the attention they give to my review and our requests, finally very soon I’ll see game progress saved!

UPDATE 2:
New update and not yet save progress of a play? At least between a floor and another… It’s something that for me is VERY bad, I can’t play 3 hours continuously to finish all three floors and so I can’t win the game. I will not play the game until save feature will be included, at least in skirmish mode. It’s something that would be present at day one. 

UPDATE:
After some hours of game I can see two things that IMO need to be improved, that would made the game better. First of all, why I can’t choose all three players for skirmish? Now the two things:
1. It needs content, but now we know developers are working on it, the same with save option, but these things make me think the game was released too soon btw…
2. More important, enemies are quite stupid, they win because they spawn continuously and not because they have a strategy or a challenging AI, but knowing the game simulate a tabletop game I can live with this, in any case, I’d like less respawn and more tactics. 

Great game, I bought it for solo because I don’t like multiplayer, but this is really making me want to try! Love many aspects of the game, it just missing a bit of variety and I can’t find out how to save a skirmish, it would be useful because very often I don’t have the time to finish the game and it’s a pity interrupt when you are having a great game. May be it’s just I have to find out how to save, but if it’s a missing feature, I think it’s very important you implement this. A bit overpriced IMO, these are the reasons I put 4 stars, but you can really have a lot of fun with this title, and this is the important thing.

So my wife and I just got a couple Quest 3 units and saw this game in some YouTube trailers. We got the game and tried it out and are IN LOVE WITH IT! All the fun of sitting around a Hero Quest game, but more so! Absolutely worth it and absolutely recommend to anyone looking for a great tabletop like game. Fantastic!

I had a great time playing this with friends, on a near daily basis for months. Then we started the Elven King episode, about the same time "the big engine update" was released. Our play sessions slowed down... and then stopped. We were active in other games, but Demeo seemed to lose some appeal and while time commitment was definitely a factor, it wasn't until I read a few recent reviews that it clicked for me. The update has made this... not quite Demeo. It upped the graphics quality and fixed some bugs, but now it feels more like a middling PC port of a console game, if that makes sense. The new visuals are grainy somehow, with aliasing running wild on a lot of the 2D elements (the cards in the store screen stand out most). Things also look brighter, with a more "arcadey" palette, maybe something to do with the way visual effects are layered. Maybe it's not as noticeable without the clarity of a Quest 3? I've also observed there to be a drop in hand tracking reliability, and none of the pre-existing problems with it got ironed out (like the placement of your deck, where choosing a card with your free hand leads to occluding the hand holding it, resulting in the deck disappearing). And in the store screen, the card purchasing is a nightmare, can't count the number of times it has given me the card next to the one i wanted. I followed videos/posts so I get the devs were moving on to BattleMarked, and I'm grateful for the attention they showed this game, but I have to say that if there was an option to go back to the previous version, that's what we'd be playing.

Code for 15% off!

[rb. Gy/ssj5tp]

Make sure you remove the spaces & brackets first.
Feel free to use the codes to buy any game you don’t already own as well.

Been playing this for3 years and still don't get tired of it. It's Slay the Spire card combat meets a tactical dungeon crawl. The only limitation is the 2.5 dungeon levels. But it does so with creative characters that really make a simplified system feel deep. Battlemarked is Demeo 2.0 and I would recommend that more (it has a few dungeon cralws like Demeo has plus two campaigns),  but if you find this on sale, get it. It's immediate fun.
Normally I only play games where you move yourself a lot, but this one is a must (and also works really well if you want to stand instead of sit). It’s just so much fun!

As a person who had never played tabletop RPG before this one, I must admit, the game is really cool. After a few sessions, I am a fan. It's charming, addictive, challenging, but not frustrating. And I just LOVE how the little figures move and swing their miniature weapons, fight their miniature battles. (the you-know-what-new-game does not have the moving figures... that's a non-negligible part of he reason why I don't have that new game :P )

reviews.review_title: Still my favourite game on the Quest
reviews.review_description:
Finally have to give a review. I play Demeo since the beginning, one to three times a week, often with friends. After some months dying becomes very rare (and normally only at the Rat-King). Definitely not to hard to win when you know your skills. Original Dungeon normally one hour when we are not in a hurry and kill and collect all. The Boss is dead very quick. Only with a pure bard team it takes a little longer ;-). So know your cards, range of the monsters and coordinate with your teammates and you will have super fun! Scenario difficulty level from low to high: 1,3+4,5,2.
PS Our Scenario nicknames: Fatty, Rat, Forrest, Desert, City. My fav is Desert 
PPS on the Q3 no problems with game stability, hedache or other things

Addictive game but there is serious bug. The Warlock’s astral strike doesn’t work. There are no graphics or damage associated with it. Suck, If you like playing with that character because it reduces one person f the better heroes to a mid tier hero. There’s not enough heros or levels for this game to have one malfunction. I rank the game a 3 of 5 stars because evidently this issue has been going on for a few months and the developers have yet to fix it. If all the players worked properly this game would be a 4 or 5.

developer_response.body: Astral Strike bug has been fixed in the latest patch (January 12:th).

reviews.review_description:
I'd prefer an easier mode with fewer enemies.
After the tutorial, right at the start of the game, all my party members got poisoned and faced a fierce enemy onslaught. One member fell, and we couldn't make much progress beyond the starting point even after 30 minutes, struggling to handle the endless waves of enemies, so I gave up.

The game exhibits degraded visual fidelity, with prominent aliasing along edges and frequent screen flickering artifacts. This results in ocular discomfort, a regression from the previous stable performance. Please address and resolve these graphical bugs promptly.

developer_response.body: Hello. We've recently made significant improvements to anti aliasing and visual clarify on Meta Quest. Thansk for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: I have played both Demeo and Demeo Battles avidly since their release and I think they are fantastic.  I am however disappointed at the high price of the original (fourty bucks??).  I have played Demeo Battles with my daughter and I went to the store to gift her the original Demeo and was definitely sticker shocked. I'm going to have to wait a bit to give it to her because it is just too expensive! I do not understand the reason why, especially as old as the game is.
Very good game, this is the type of game I’ve always wanted. I have been a board gamer for a lot of years and play alone and have always dreamed of games like this.
it is the best
This game is pure cinema i love it its cool visually beautiful and most of all its multiplayer pls buy this if your are a d&d fan. ( make yure to check out their other game that is literally d&d)

The game is great. But how come when i try to purchase the bundle I do not get the cost of the original discounted as is noted on the purchase page?
I paid for the original…which is the same price(????) as the bundle.

Endless enemies but our heroes only get 10hp to start and your journey will come to end real quick; very frustrating to play....
deleted!!

Finally started making some progress and then the game completely crashed. Black screen every time I went back in with my family. Had to uninstall and reinstall so all of my progress was LOST! 
4 gb of storage remaining on my headset, so it wasn’t a storage issue. 🤬 PISSED!

I’m sure this is a good game, since so many people love it, but my experience with it was terrible. The tutorial didn’t do nearly enough to prepare me for the actual game.  I get swarmed and killed and have no idea how to keep that from happening. Clearly this is a “me” problem, but I can’t imagine that my experience was unique. Maybe you’re supposed to find an online game with an experienced player to help get you up to speed, but as a single-player trying to figure it out from scratch, it’s a frustrating, zero-fun experience that I have little interest in revisiting.
Having sides of the dice roll make your characters attack eachother is beyond moronic.
The price might be just a bit over the top, but it's worth it. I'm really into DND and a game like this in VR is basically heaven. More maps would be fun too.
It says I need to have horizon plus to play. I used to just be able to play. Plz help me with the not being able to play. It is a good game tho

developer_response.body:
Hello SoulCrushinBalto,
It sounds like you played the game via a Meta Horizon + subscription that ended. To play the game again you can either buy it from the store or reactivate your Meta Horizon + subscription.

reviews.review_description: Black screen problem. Not playable, need fixing but LEVEL 95 UPGRADE İS HERE. what a wonderful solution.

developer_response.body:
Hi arxside, we're sorry you are experiencing problems.
Some players who have had problems with black screen it help to reset their play space, can you try restting in Settings > Physical Space (or Environment Setup) and then redraw your boundary?
If you are still experiencing issues please reach out to us, either in the Demeo Discord or via support@resolutiongames.com.

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR Games ever
reviews.review_description:
Demeo is easily one of thr best VR games ever.
Highly replayable due to its randomly generated levels and the possibility to create different teams of the available characters. 
It's totally fun in multiplayer and has a big community.

However demeo is not for the casual Minecraft player. It has a strong learning curve and the tutorial only shows you the surface of the game, the tactical depth stays hidden. 
That being said, when starting the game you should play with someone who's experienced and able to explain a lot to you. 
Don't listen to the 1 Star crybabies here. It is fun.
Demeo is hard but never unfair.
I played a lot with beginners who told me they struggle with the game, after some hours they loved it too.

Now go get in that dungeon...the king of the necropolis awaits

It’s an excellent social strategy game but it isn’t like most ttrpg in that there is no story turn by turn and is much more combat based. Movement is really cool and I love the game but more dice possibilities would be nice though.

People complaining about difficulty should be happy. Who wants a game u can destroy in 5 mins? Come on guys if u can die and come back with a room code keep the mobs coming keep spawning more food for kanna to eat.  Just grind level up learn the enemies. Pick them up see what they are immune too. See how to inflict more damage. Did u know the acid is flammable? No you didn't go do ur homework this game gets 10 stars. The nerve.

You like d and d? Y you like epic battles and out of this world characters?y you like multiple campaigns and loads of unlockables  ?why haven't u bought it yet?. I guarantee loads of fun or I'll pay u myself. sPiLLa_dA_dRiLLa.
What the best games I have love to play it wish they would come out with more Monster manuals. I would be willing to pay money for new monster manuals/ Maps

I got the quest plus just to be able to play this and I am loving it. Lvl15 already, can you do better?
Edit: I am so excited for the new game with D&D I will see you all in a dungeon very soon.

reviews.review_title: If D&D Was All Grind, No Adventure
reviews.review_description: As a fan of D&D and tactical cooperative dungeon crawlers, I really wanted to love Demeo, but the experience quickly became frustrating and tedious. Instead of feeling like a strategic adventure, the game overwhelms you with endless waves of spawning monsters that drag out every encounter far past the point of being fun. What could have been tense, thoughtful battles turn into repetitive slogs, where progress feels more like surviving a war of attrition than clever teamwork. The constant onslaught is demoralizing, sapping any sense of accomplishment or momentum, and it makes each session feel like a chore rather than a thrilling quest. I enjoy games in this genre, but Demeo’s design choices make it more exhausting than engaging.

reviews.review_title: Takes the joy out of the game
reviews.review_description: I bought this game a while back and just can't play it. I just gave up trying to play it even with a friend doing co-op Enemies continue to spawn and just grind you to dust. I just downloaded it again since it's been a while and there's no difficulty setting and it's near impossible to play. It takes someone like me who is a casual gamer and just ruins the experience.

reviews.review_title: I can beat every boss alone
reviews.review_description:
If you can't beat this game you're either a little kid, blind, or just don't have any tactical sense at all. 
I play alone most of the time (sad; I know) but I've been able to beat all of the dungeons. The easiest is The Elven Queen and the toughest is The Mad Eleven King Rackarn. 

My favorite combo used to be 2 Bards/2 Barbs.
They're fun for sure. Now it's 4 Hunters.
Multiple "Hail of Arrows" on a team of Hunters equates to a massive amount of DPS. But the best part of playing a Hunter is their pets. You can amass a LOT of pets using this combo.
I typically have 20 to 30 pets going into the 3rd dungeon.
On the easiest boss (The Queen) my Hunters don't even need to attack. I can literally let the pets do all of the work. It's hilarious to watch.

But by far, the easiest combo for completing all the dungeons is using four assassins. Most of you already know there are a few potions that do not break "sneak" so you remain invisible; like a health potion. BUT there is an attack that doesn't break sneak. It is called Cursed Dagger. 
It's listed damage is 3/6 but you get +2 dmg by attacking from the side or behind (backstab) PLUS you get +3 extra damage from being in sneak. So, even with no attack buffs on (from strength potions or Courage from a Bard) you are hitting for 8 dmg (non-crit) AND not breaking sneak! If you have a Bard in your group and 2 STR potions, you are hitting for 11 and critting for 14! ALL while remaining invisible!
That's almost as much damage as Blink while sneak is active.

I felt the need to update my review based on 1)the 1 star reviews I’ve read, as these are the first reviews I read when I consider purchasing a new game, and 2) my experiences since the various updates. In regards to the 1 star reviews: these are mostly based on the difficulty of the game, and to be sure, this game is HARD. Which is as it should be. This is not a game for casual gamers, this is for gamers that understand the concepts of teamwork and strategy, without both you will lose but skilled players will find the difficulty level very satisfactory and rewarding when you clear the various dungeons. You won’t breeze through these dungeons, you will crawl and struggle and it will be difficult but it will be be fun and enjoyable and so rewarding. New campaigns have been added since I started playing as well as the hang out basement and paint tables, all welcome additions. The single player and two player modes are a very welcome addition and are a huge improvement. My issues: Zap spell is broken in some campaigns and can really hurt your team at random times. If you die fighting the boss you have to restart the entire campaign, that’s a little harsh. You should be able to reload the beginning of the current floor of the campaign. The campaigns are long and batteries only last so long. And that’s about it. If you’re a fan of tabletop games or D&D then this game is  an absolute must buy. 4 stars because there’s no 4.5 option.
This game is really great! Theres no glitches and i have played it over and over again. But it really needs to have more missions, i will happily pay to get some dlc!

Updating my review as it’s been years.
STILL easily one of the best games ever made for VR and especially Mixed reality, hand tracking etc. 
Game is almost a masterpiece and CANNOT wait for BattleMarked to come out!! 

Just bought my Quest 2 a week ago (been 
putting it off for months as I have had PSVR for 5 years. (Have been eyeing this game for months , and another game launching this week)

Bought my Quest, installed  this game and it’s amazing! The Single Player mode is fun, as you can play 3-4 character ls at once, learn the basics and the skills of each class you can possibly group with. The Online is super fun, I have only grouped up online with people I have found on the Discord, so those matches have all been good and made plenty of new friends. 

The Maps are fun, mobs are cool and the detail when you zoom right in is awesome. 

I already look forward to more content and maps, I would be happy to do a pay DLC if it came with a couple new boards and another class :)

Get a game going in minutes. 
Cool skins etc as your account levels up
Even different skins for your actual game board characters to equip and change their look.

If you like D&D, Board games, co-op games, strategy games, you should most definitely like Demeo!

reviews.review_title: Nice game looking forward to further dev
reviews.review_description:
Really nice base of a game but lacking in storyline and personalization. 
Would be really nice to have unique items, builds and unique options to choose that lead to outcomes. - 5 Star for being on the right track to top tier game.

The update came and broke elements of the game, but more updates came to fix them.  Still, I have problems on my Quest Pro and the PCVR version didn't get the last update, which is where I always play the game.  So now I am no longer playing with the same version as many for whom I host and that causes more problems.  Must I also buy the Steam version of the game to continue to play?  I keep most games on my PC because that's where I have the most storage and it's better for hosting.

developer_response.body:
Hi @Willard007,  we're sorry you are experiencing problems.
We did have an issue with the Meta Rift/PCVR version a while back. If you are still experiencing issues please reach out to us, either in the Demeo Discord or via support@resolutiongames.com.

reviews.review_description:
I’ve spent a decent number of hours in Demeo hoping it would click, but the more I play, the more I realize how deeply flawed the core experience is. The concept is fantastic: a tabletop-style VR/PC dungeon crawler with co-op potential and a nostalgic aesthetic. But all of that quickly falls apart under the weight of broken mechanics and deeply unbalanced gameplay.

The most glaring issue is enemy balance. Mobs often spawn in excessive numbers with little warning or logic, completely overwhelming the party. Difficulty spikes come out of nowhere, turning what should be tactical planning into a desperate scramble to survive. It feels less like a challenge and more like the game is actively trying to punish you for progressing.

Then there’s the line of sight system—if you can even call it that. Too often, you’ll find enemies attacking from areas you can’t see or target, or worse, you’ll waste a move trying to hit something you should be able to reach, only for the game to tell you it’s blocked. It’s inconsistent and frankly game-breaking, especially for a strategy-focused title where positioning should matter.

And while I could overlook a bug or two in a smaller indie game, these aren’t minor issues. These are fundamental flaws that affect every session. It’s hard to build any momentum or enjoy the co-op experience when you’re constantly being blindsided by broken logic and wildly unfair enemy encounters.

Demeo could be great—but it isn’t. Right now, it’s a frustrating mess of missed opportunities. Until the devs seriously rework enemy balancing and fix the core gameplay mechanics (especially line of sight), I can’t recommend this to anyone looking for a fair or rewarding experience.

reviews.review_title: One of the best vr table game
reviews.review_description: Yes, the game is indeed not easy, but you have to be skilled, set up a strategy, and think through your moves carefully. The game is very nicely designed, both in terms of animations and gameplay. You will really enjoy it if you like similar board games, I highly recommend it to everyone!

Game in VR i was looking for! Like old school D&D not exact but pretty close! Im also an older gamer so there is that to consider. Im sure it is way more fun when you are with another player also. Props, from me anyway. 
-Darkk

This is a game to play with friends and have a chill night. It's always a struggle to beat the final boss, but that is what makes it so endlessly replayable and entertaining. This isn't meant to be high octane action and easy to beat on the first try.If you enjoy D&D battling or have ever played the board game Hero Quest, then this will be right up your alley.

I've been craving more games like this, so it is very exciting to see them announce a new game in partnership with D&D. I just hope there are more campaigns and maybe a little more story.

This is a very good and deep game. I love playing coop. Lost a star for being one of the most brutal games ever. It's often too hard and unfair. That is unfortunate because it is really good. Don't wanna play often due to this. Needs a difficulty setting. That would open this good game up for those of us less nerdy tabletop players who rage quit. 

A leveling system would be another way to negate the difficulty,  something to work for.
Second best VR game I've played. The D&D version of Demeo is the best. Easy and tons of fun. The maps are amazing. Wish my headset batteries would let me play all day.

reviews.review_title: Phenomenal DnD fix to you junkies
reviews.review_description: This is absolutely a difficult game to do single player but STRATEGY is involved and all these plebs complaining about the difficulty or "endless dungeon" are actually game features and while the game scales to the amount of players having friends or BEING SOCIAL are an advantage to this game.
